globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto:; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
